error_variants.name: MissingPrompt
error_variants.rationale: The lowered-only public runtime still needs a missing-delimiter failure.

error_variants.name: CrossThread
error_variants.rationale: Runtime ownership remains thread-affine even after the stackful backend is gone.

error_variants.name: RuntimeBusy
error_variants.rationale: Active-runtime teardown misuse remains a public runtime concern.

error_variants.name: RuntimeDestroyed
error_variants.rationale: Destroyed-runtime misuse remains a public runtime concern.

error_variants.name: NonDiagonalComplete
error_variants.rationale: Non-diagonal completion is still part of the public shift/reset semantic contract.

error_variants.name: FrontendSuspend
error_variants.rationale: Replay-driven explicit frontend operations still use suspend as part of the lowered public execution contract.

error_variants.name: ProgramContractViolation
error_variants.rationale: Explicit frontend program-shape violations still remain observable through the lowered public execution contract.

error_variants.name: AlreadyResolved
error_variants.rationale: This one-shot raw continuation misuse no longer belongs to the canonical lowered runtime surface.

error_variants.name: NestedNonDiagonalCapture
error_variants.rationale: This stackful capture detail no longer belongs to the canonical lowered runtime surface.
